\tzpentry{ID6070}{Pi Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID6070 introduces Pi Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\sum_i (\varphi_i \bmod 2\pi) \equiv 0$
\]
